text: The Middle East crisis is costing Europe about €500 million ($600 million) per day in extra energy costs due to price spikes.
text_zh: 由于价格飙升，中东危机每天给欧洲造成约5亿欧元（6亿美元）的额外能源成本。

text: WarTranslated It is reported that a series of explosions occurred in temporarily occupied Melitopol, Zaporizhzhia region, followed by a partial blackout. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2047067416782361014/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 据报道，扎波罗热地区被临时占领的梅利托波尔发生了一系列爆炸，随后部分地区停电。 https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2047067416782361014/photo/1 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah has released footage of an FPV drone against an Israeli Merkava tank in Al-Bayyada, southern Lebanon. Video from April 6th @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 真主党发布了其FPV无人机在黎巴嫩南部Al-Bayyada攻击一辆以色列梅卡瓦坦克的画面。视频拍摄于4月6日 @wfwitness

text: OSINTtechnical In a sudden move, the Secretary of the Navy, John C. Phelan, is departing his role effective immediately. tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 美国海军部长约翰·C·费伦（John C. Phelan）突然离职，即刻生效。推文

text: WarMonitor House Judiciary Democrats have asked Kash Patel to fill out an AUDIT questionnaire, a screening tool used to assess alcohol use disorders and potential dependence. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2047065997371130197/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 众议院司法委员会民主党人已要求卡什·帕特尔（Kash Patel）填写一份AUDIT问卷，这是一种用于评估酒精使用障碍和潜在依赖性的筛查工具。 https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2047065997371130197/photo/1 推文

text: Two Israeli Air Force technicians are facing espionage charges for allegedly passing F-15 fighter jet technical information and photos to Iran. The suspects, stationed at Tel Nof, were detained for weeks and are now set for prosecution.
text_zh: 两名以色列空军技术人员因涉嫌向伊朗传递F-15战斗机的技术信息和照片而面临间谍罪指控。这些嫌疑人驻扎在特尔诺夫（Tel Nof），已被拘留数周，目前准备接受起诉。

text: The Spectator Index US Secretary of the Navy John C. Phelan has stepped down. https://twitter.com/spectatorindex/status/2047065898100592908/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 美国海军部长约翰·C·费伦（John C. Phelan）已辞职。 https://twitter.com/spectatorindex/status/2047065898100592908/photo/1 推文

text: WarTranslated The fighters of the 2nd Assault Battalion rescued their comrade under heavy fire, neutralized the infiltrated Russians, and took one prisoner. https://youtu.be/9KwhqB2GVLw?si=1_-inqI3m146kK2h https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2047063898889589247/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 第2突击营的战士在猛烈炮火下救出了战友，消灭了渗透进来的俄罗斯人，并俘虏了一名士兵。 https://youtu.be/9KwhqB2GVLw?si=1_-inqI3m146kK2h https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2047063898889589247/video/1 推文

text: WarMonitor A Virginia circuit court judge has ruled the state’s redistricting amendment unconstitutional, declaring it “void from the start.” The ruling blocks the new maps and says votes from the April 21 special election are ineffective, though an appeal is likely. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2047063618840133897/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 弗吉尼亚州巡回法院法官裁定该州的选区重划修正案违宪，宣布其“自始无效”。该裁决阻止了新地图的使用，并称4月21日特别选举的投票无效，尽管很可能会提起上诉。 https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2047063618840133897/photo/1 推文

text: OSINTtechnical Iran's IRGC Navy has released footage of its forces seizing a pair of container ships in the Strait of Hormuz this morning. https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2047062175726903355/video/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队海军发布了其部队今天上午在霍尔木兹海峡扣押两艘集装箱船的画面。 https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2047062175726903355/video/1 推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guards Corps (IRGC) released footage of its forces boarding and seizing the Greek-owned MSC Epaminondas container ship in the Strait of Hormuz on Wednesday. In the statement released earlier, the IRGC claimed that the vessel was operating "without the necessary permits," which caused it to be detained. tweet
text_zh: Status-6 (战争与军事新闻) 伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队（IRGC）发布了其部队于周三在霍尔木兹海峡登船并扣押希腊拥有的“MSC Epaminondas”号集装箱船的画面。在早些时候发表的声明中，伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队声称该船在“没有必要许可”的情况下运营，因此被扣留。推文

text: The Spectator Index Trump says that the blockade worries Iran more than bombing, according to Fox News report. tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 据福克斯新闻报道，特朗普表示，封锁比轰炸更让伊朗担忧。推文

text: A fire erupted on USS Zumwalt at a Mississippi shipyard during upgrades. The crew extinguished it, three sailors were injured but stable. The U.S. Navy is investigating the cause.
text_zh: 密西西比州一家造船厂的“朱姆沃尔特”号（USS Zumwalt）驱逐舰在升级期间发生火灾。船员扑灭了火势，三名水手受伤但情况稳定。美国海军正在调查起火原因。

text: Turkish President Erdogan says the escalating Middle East conflict is “starting to weaken Europe”, warning economic and energy impacts are spreading beyond the region. He called for “peace-oriented approaches” and negotiations, offering Türkiye as a mediator.
text_zh: 土耳其总统埃尔多安表示，不断升级的中东冲突“开始削弱欧洲”，并警告称经济和能源影响正在蔓延到该地区之外。他呼吁采取“以和平为导向的方法”和进行谈判，并提议由土耳其担任调解人。

text: A top envoy to President Trump has asked FIFA to swap Iran for Italy at the next World Cup. Source: FT
text_zh: 特朗普总统的一名高级特使已要求国际足联在下一届世界杯中用意大利队替换伊朗队。来源：金融时报（FT）

text: The FBI briefly examined a New York Times reporter after she reported on Director Kash Patel’s use of agents to protect his girlfriend. Agents explored possible stalking violations and interviewed the girlfriend, but Justice Department officials found no legal basis and the case was dropped. Source: NYT
text_zh: 在《纽约时报》一名记者报道了卡什·帕特尔（Kash Patel）局长利用特工保护其女友的消息后，联邦调查局（FBI）对其进行了短暂调查。特工们调查了可能的跟踪违规行为并采访了其女友，但司法部官员认为没有法律依据，案件被撤销。来源：《纽约时报》（NYT）

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 CBS: Iran “maintains more military capabilities than the White House… admitted,” according to US officials familiar with intelligence. Officials say that at the start of the ceasefire, around half of Iran’s ballistic missile stockpile and associated…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. Press Secretary Leavitt denied CBS's report that U.S. intelligence assess that Iran maintains more military capability than the Trump administration is admitting in public. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 CBS：据熟悉情报的美国官员称，伊朗‘拥有的军事能力超过了白宫……所承认的’。官员们表示，在停火开始时，伊朗约一半的弹道导弹库存及相关……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国新闻秘书莱维特否认了 CBS 的报道，该报道称美国情报部门评估认为伊朗拥有的军事能力超过了特朗普政府公开承认的水平。@wfwitness

text: BREAKING: Secretary of the Navy John C. Phelan has stepped down effective immediately.
text_zh: 突发：海军部长约翰·C·费伦（John C. Phelan）已立即辞职。

text: ⚡️ 🇳🇱 🇸🇾 Today, the Dutch Minister for Asylum and Migration, Bart van den Brink, announced a new update to the asylum policy concerning Syria, with a specific focus on the situation of the Druze community. The Minister highlighted the violations committed against the Druze as documented in the UN report. Although the overall level of violence in Syria has decreased, Druze regions particularly in Swaida continue to experience sporadic yet serious attacks, and the situation remains fragile. The Druze have been officially recognized as a vulnerable group (risicoprofiel). @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇳🇱 🇸🇾 今天，荷兰庇护与移民大臣巴特·范登布林克（Bart van den Brink）宣布了关于叙利亚庇护政策的最新更新，特别关注德鲁兹社区的局势。大臣强调了联合国报告中记录的针对德鲁兹人的侵权行为。尽管叙利亚的总体暴力水平有所下降，但德鲁兹地区，特别是苏韦达（Swaida），仍不时发生严重袭击，局势依然脆弱。德鲁兹人已被正式认定为弱势群体（风险概况）。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 U.S. Navy Secretary John C. Phelan is departing the administration effective immediately, with Undersecretary Hung Cao set to serve as Acting Secretary of the Navy. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 美国海军部长约翰·C·费伦（John C. Phelan）即刻离职，副部长洪曹（Hung Cao）将担任代理海军部长。@wfwitness

text: WATCH: Liberia-flagged container ship MSC Epaminondas being boarded by a special forces team from the IRGC Navy as it attempted to breach the blockade of the Strait of Hormuz.
text_zh: 观看：悬挂利比里亚国旗的集装箱船“MSC Epaminondas”号在试图突破霍尔木兹海峡封锁时，被伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队海军特种部队登船控制。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷 The IRGC Navy announces the seizure of two vessels in the coast of Iran. MSC-FRANCESCA with alleged links to Israel, and EPAMINODES, were seized by the IRGC Navy and directed to the coast of Iran. IRGC Navy added that the ships violated maritime security…" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Footage of the IRGC Navy boarding and seizing the MSC Epaminodes earlier today in the Strait of Hormuz off the coast of Iran. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷 伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队海军宣布在伊朗海岸扣押了两艘船只。据称与以色列有关联的‘MSC-FRANCESCA’号和‘EPAMINODES’号被伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队海军扣押，并被引导至伊朗海岸。伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队海军补充说，这些船只违反了海上安全……” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 今天早些时候，伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队海军在伊朗海岸外的霍尔木兹海峡登船并扣押“MSC Epaminodes”号的画面。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to ResistanceTrench: "🇮🇷 🇮🇱 seizure of Israeli container ships in the Strait of Hormuz by the IRGC. 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost" 🇮🇷 🇮🇱 Both captured ships belong to Israel which sail under false flag and manipulate their identity when trading with arab countries of region. The company offices are located in Ashdod and Haifa. 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 ResistanceTrench：“🇮🇷 🇮🇱 伊斯兰革命卫队在霍尔木兹海峡扣押以色列集装箱船。🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost” 🇮🇷 🇮🇱 两艘被扣押的船只均属于以色列，它们悬挂假旗航行，并在与该地区阿拉伯国家进行贸易时伪造身份。公司办公室位于阿什杜德和海法。🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost

text: The Spectator Index Oil prices up over 3% today amid attacks on vessels in the Strait of Hormuz. tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index：由于霍尔木兹海峡的船只遇袭，今日油价上涨超过3%。推文

text: WarMonitor The FBI launched an investigation into a New York Times reporter after she reported that Director Kash Patel used bureau resources to provide his girlfriend with security and transportation. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2047060090583175438/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor：联邦调查局（FBI）对《纽约时报》的一名记者展开了调查，此前她报道称，局长卡什·帕特尔（Kash Patel）动用局内资源为他的女友提供安保和交通服务。https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2047060090583175438/photo/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender According to USNI, a fire aboard the U.S. Navy Zumwalt-class guided missile destroyer USS Zumwalt (DDG-1000) occurred last night around 9:45p.m. local time, injuring 3 sailors, 2 of whom were treated at the scene and 1 was transported to the hospital. The USS Zumwalt is in the HII Ingalls shipyard in Pascagoula, MS, to be fitted with necessary equipment to launch hypersonic missiles. The cause of the fire is under investigation. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender：据美国海军学会（USNI）消息，美国海军朱姆沃尔特级导弹驱逐舰“朱姆沃尔特”号（DDG-1000）昨晚当地时间晚上9:45左右发生火灾，造成3名水手受伤，其中2人在现场接受治疗，1人被送往医院。“朱姆沃尔特”号目前停靠在密西西比州帕斯卡古拉的亨廷顿英格尔斯工业（HII）造船厂，正在加装发射高超音速导弹所需的设备。火灾原因正在调查中。推文

text: WarMonitor Iran says no women were facing execution, directly disputing Trump’s claim that he “saved” eight from death. Reporting suggests some faced serious charges, but not imminent executions, with unverified claims circulating that the images Trump shared may have been AI-generated. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2047058776004460731/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor：伊朗称没有女性面临死刑，直接反驳了特朗普关于他“拯救”了八人免于死亡的说法。报道显示，一些人面临严重指控，但并未面临迫在眉睫的处决，且有未经证实的说法称特朗普分享的图片可能是人工智能生成的。https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2047058776004460731/photo/1 推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) Photos of a Russian Orlan-type reconnaissance UAV employed as an FPV drone mothership. One drone already seen released. After Shahed/Geran, Gerbera and Molniya, Orlan joins the list of Russian UAVs that started being used as FPV drone carriers. /7309?single https://twitter.com/Archer83Able/status/2047057805585072200/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Status-6 (War & Military News)：俄罗斯“海鹰”（Orlan）型侦察无人机作为FPV无人机母舰使用的照片。已可见一架无人机被释放。继“见证者”（Shahed）/“天竺葵”（Geran）、“天竺葵花”（Gerbera）和“闪电”（Molniya）之后，“海鹰”加入了开始被用作FPV无人机载具的俄罗斯无人机名单。/7309?single https://twitter.com/Archer83Able/status/2047057805585072200/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Hezbollah members Mouhamad Hourani and Ali Bazzi were eliminated in an IDF targeted strike. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047057637485740103/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel：真主党成员穆罕默德·胡拉尼（Mouhamad Hourani）和阿里·巴齐（Ali Bazzi）在以色列国防军的定点清除行动中被击毙。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047057637485740103/photo/1 推文

text: The Spectator Index The Pentagon has told Congress it 'could take six months to fully clear the Strait of Hormuz of mines deployed by the Iranian military', according to Washington Post report. tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index：据《华盛顿邮报》报道，五角大楼已告知国会，“可能需要六个月时间才能完全清除伊朗军方在霍尔木兹海峡部署的水雷”。推文

text: The Spectator Index President Trump gave a deadline until Sunday for Iran to present a unified proposal, according to Israel's Channel 12. tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index：据以色列第12频道报道，特朗普总统给伊朗设定了周日为最后期限，要求其提交一份统一的提案。推文

text: Open Source Intel Al-Akhbar, a Lebanese outlet linked to Hezbollah, reports that the body of its journalist Amal Khalil was recovered from the rubble of a building hit by the IDF in A-Tiri. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047056296663228457/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel：与真主党有关联的黎巴嫩媒体《Al-Akhbar》报道称，其记者阿迈勒·哈利勒（Amal Khalil）的遗体已从以色列国防军在阿提里（A-Tiri）袭击的一栋建筑废墟中被找到。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047056296663228457/photo/1 推文

text: WarMonitor Iran sees Trump’s “indefinite” timeline as an open window. With no hard deadline, it can stall, rebuild its military, and tighten its grip on the Strait of Hormuz... its biggest leverage point. So, the longer this drags on, the more it shifts in Iran’s favor. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2047056219823587714/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor：伊朗将特朗普的“无限期”时间表视为一个开放的窗口。由于没有硬性截止日期，它可以拖延时间、重建军事力量并加强对霍尔木兹海峡的控制……这是它最大的筹码。因此，拖得越久，局势就越向有利于伊朗的方向转变。https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2047056219823587714/video/1 推文

text: The Spectator Index Tesla share price rises by 4% after beating expectations for earnings in Q1 2026. tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index：特斯拉股价在2026年第一季度财报超出预期后上涨了4%。推文

text: Michael A. Horowitz US military intercepts at least 3 Iranian oil tankers in Asian waters, shipping and security sources tell Reuters tweet
text_zh: Michael A. Horowitz：航运和安全消息人士告诉路透社，美军在亚洲海域拦截了至少3艘伊朗油轮。推文

text: OSINTtechnical Russia’s Tuapse oil refinery and Black Sea export facility continued to suffer a catastrophic blaze days after it was hit by a Ukrainian drone attack. Locals report that crude oil continues to rain on the city for a third day in a row. https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2047054761875185828/video/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical：俄罗斯图阿普谢（Tuapse）炼油厂及黑海出口设施在遭到乌克兰无人机袭击数天后，仍处于灾难性火灾中。当地居民报告称，原油已连续第三天像雨一样落在城市上空。https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2047054761875185828/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel JUST IN 🔴 U.S. forces have intercepted at least 3 Iranian oil tankers in Asian waters, according to shipping and maritime security sources. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel：突发新闻 🔴 据航运和海上安全消息人士称，美军已在亚洲海域拦截了至少3艘伊朗油轮。推文

text: 🇮🇷 🇮🇱 seizure of Israeli container ships in the Strait of Hormuz by the IRGC. 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🇮🇱 伊斯兰革命卫队在霍尔木兹海峡扣押以色列集装箱船。🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost

text: 📝 Иранская война 📝 главные события к исходу 22 апреля Вокруг нового раунда переговоров США и Ирана сегодня окончательно воцарился хаос. Сначала в Вашингтоне решили в одностороннем порядке продлить перемирие, не снимая морскую блокаду, а в Тегеране фактически дали понять, что на таких условиях говорить не о чем. ➡️ Уже с утра стало ясно, что даже сама система прохода через Ормуз всё сильнее выходит из-под контроля. Вскрылась история с индийским танкером Sanmar Herald , чей капитан перевёл деньги мошенникам в криптовалюте, приняв их за посредников КСИР. В итоге судно всё равно попало под обстрел, а сам эпизод показал, насколько дорогим, мутным и рискованным стал любой проход через пролив. ➡️ На этом фоне разговоры о переговорах быстро посыпались. В Тегеране официально отказались от участия во встрече 22 апреля в Исламабаде , а Джей Ди Вэнс отменил поездку в Пакистан. Трамп в ответ решил продлить перемирие в одностороннем порядке, сославшись на просьбы пакистанцев и якобы отсутствие единой позиции у иранского руководства. ➡️ Но и это ничего не стабилизировало. Продление паузы превратилось в формулу «ни войны, ни мира»: американцы сохраняют морскую блокаду, в Иране не принимают предварительные условия, а напряжение в Ормузе только растёт. Публично уступать не хочет никто, хотя и в Вашингтоне, и в Тегеране понимают, что новый виток боевых действий будет стоить дорого. ➡️ В самом Иране срыв переговорного трека встретили без сожаления . В Тегеране прошла демонстрация, на которой КСИР впервые открыто показал баллистические ракеты «Хоррамшахр», а параллельно ещё захватили два контейнеровоза в Ормузском проливе. ➡️ К исходу дня подтвердилось, что как минимум три контейнеровоза были обстреляны с катеров КСИР, два из них — Epaminondas и MSC Francesca — были захвачены. Формально иранцы объяснили это нарушением режима прохода, но судовладельцы уже заявляют, что разрешения у части судов были. ➡️ Экономические последствия тоже становятся всё жёстче. В Gunvor уже прямо предупреждают о риске глобальной рецессии в горизонте трёх месяцев. Причина не только в нефти: кризис вокруг Ормуза уже бьёт по металлам, лекарствам, продовольствию и авиационному топливу. Война, которую в Вашингтоне рассчитывали удержать в управляемых рамках, начала бить по всей мировой торговле. ➡️ На других направлениях тоже идёт подогрев обстановки. В Иракском Курдистане утром был атакован нефтяной объект в Эрбиле , а позже ещё один удар пришёлся по базе курдской оппозиции в Сордаше . За этими атаками, судя по всему, стоит всё то же «Исламское сопротивление», которое и в период перемирия не прекращает держать Ирак в состоянии тлеющего кризиса. ➡️ На политическом фоне Запад тоже демонстрирует привычную двусмысленность. В ЕС так и не смогли согласовать приостановку соглашения об ассоциации с Израилем , несмотря на Газу, Ливан и расширение поселений. А в самих США Трамп продолжает помогать срыву диалога уже почти в ручном режиме — вплоть до того, что подхватывает нейросетевые фейк и про «восьмерых иранских девушек», существующих только в виде картинки из соцсетей. 📎 Карты в высоком разрешении: 🔸 Очаги нестабильности ( ru ; en ) 🔸 Удары по Ираку ( ru ; en ) 🔸 Обстановка в Ормузском проливе ( ru ; en ) #дайджест #Израиль #Ирак #Иран #Ливан #Пакистан #США ✈ RU | ✈ EN | ✉ MAX ✉ VK | ✉ RuTube | ✉ ОК | ✉ Дзен 💸 Поддержать нас
text_zh:
[
  "📝 伊朗战争 📝 4月22日结束时的主要事件。今天，围绕美国和伊朗新一轮谈判的局势彻底陷入混乱。起初，华盛顿决定单方面延长停火协议，但不解除海上封锁，而德黑兰实际上明确表示，在这样的条件下没有什么可谈的。",
  "➡️ 从早上开始，显而易见的是，即使是霍尔木兹海峡的通行系统也越来越失控。印度油轮“Sanmar Herald”号的事件曝光，其船长因误将诈骗者当作伊斯兰革命卫队（IRGC）的中间人而向其转账。结果，该船仍然遭到炮击，这一事件本身表明，通过海峡的任何通行都变得多么昂贵、混乱和危险。",
  "➡️ 在此背景下，关于谈判的讨论迅速破裂。德黑兰正式拒绝参加4月22日在伊斯兰堡举行的会议，J.D.万斯取消了巴基斯坦之行。作为回应，特朗普决定单方面延长停火，理由是巴基斯坦方面的请求，以及伊朗领导层据称缺乏统一立场。",
  "➡️ 但这并没有稳定任何局势。延长停火演变成了一种“既非战争也非和平”的模式：美国维持海上封锁，伊朗不接受先决条件，而霍尔木兹海峡的紧张局势却在加剧。没有人愿意公开让步，尽管华盛顿和德黑兰都明白，新一轮的敌对行动将付出高昂代价。",
  "➡️ 在伊朗国内，谈判进程的破裂并未引起遗憾。德黑兰举行了示威游行，伊斯兰革命卫队首次公开展示了“霍拉姆沙赫尔”（Khorramshahr）弹道导弹，同时还在霍尔木兹海峡扣押了两艘集装箱船。",
  "➡️ 到当天结束时，已证实至少有三艘集装箱船遭到伊斯兰革命卫队快艇的炮击，其中两艘——“Epaminondas”号和“MSC Francesca”号——被扣押。伊朗方面正式解释称这是因为违反了通行制度，但船东已经声明，部分船只拥有通行许可。",
  "➡️ 经济后果也变得越来越严重。贡沃尔集团（Gunvor）已经直接警告称，三个月内存在全球经济衰退的风险。原因不仅在于石油：围绕霍尔木兹海峡的危机已经冲击了金属、药品、食品和航空燃油。华盛顿原本希望将战争控制在可控范围内，但现在它已经开始冲击整个全球贸易。",
  "➡️ 在其他方向，局势也在升温。伊拉克库尔德斯坦的埃尔比勒一处石油设施上午遭到袭击，随后索尔达什（Sordash）的库尔德反对派基地也遭到另一次打击。从各方面来看，这些袭击的背后依然是“伊斯兰抵抗组织”，即使在停火期间，他们也没有停止让伊拉克处于持续的危机状态。",
  "➡️ 在政治背景下，西方也表现出了一贯的模棱两可。尽管发生了加沙、黎巴嫩冲突以及定居点扩张，欧盟仍未能就暂停与以色列的联系国协议达成一致。而在美国国内，特朗普继续以近乎手动的方式破坏对话——甚至采纳了关于“八名伊朗女孩”的神经网络虚假信息，这些女孩仅存在于社交媒体的图片中。",
  "📎 高分辨率地图：🔸 不稳定地区 ( ru ; en ) 🔸 对伊拉克的打击 ( ru ; en ) 🔸 霍尔木兹海峡局势 ( ru ; en ) #摘要 #以色列 #伊拉克 #伊朗 #黎巴嫩 #巴基斯坦 #美国 ✈ RU | ✈ EN | ✉ MAX ✉ VK | ✉ RuTube | ✉ OK | ✉ Dzen 💸 支持我们"
]

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. forces have directed 29 vessels to turn around or return to port as part of the naval blockade on Iran. The U.S. military said recent media reports claiming that several commercial ships evaded the blockade are inaccurate, specifically referencing the vessels Hero II, Hedy, and Dorena. They report Hero II and Hedy did not pass through the blockade but are currently anchored in Chah Bahar, Iran, after being intercepted earlier this week. Dorena, meanwhile, is under escort by a U.S. Navy destroyer in the Indian Ocean after attempting to violate the blockade. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国军队已指示 29 艘船只掉头或返回港口，作为对伊朗海军封锁的一部分。美军表示，近期媒体关于几艘商船躲避封锁的报道是不准确的，特别提到了 Hero II、Hedy 和 Dorena 号船只。他们报告称，Hero II 和 Hedy 号并未通过封锁区，在被拦截后目前停泊在伊朗恰巴哈尔。与此同时，Dorena 号在试图违反封锁后，正由一艘美国海军驱逐舰在印度洋护送。@wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel Reports from Iran: Over 100 Basij members were hospitalized in Parand, Tehran, after their food was poisoned by an unidentified individual. One Basij member, according to the report died from severe poisoning. tweet
text_zh: 来自伊朗的开源情报报告：德黑兰帕兰德（Parand）有 100 多名巴斯基（Basij）成员因食物被不明人士投毒而住院。据报道，一名巴斯基成员因严重中毒死亡。推文

text: Open Source Intel U.S. fighter jets intercepted Iranian kamikaze drones over Erbil, Iraq. Explosions reported from the interceptions. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：美国战斗机在伊拉克埃尔比勒上空拦截了伊朗自杀式无人机。据报道，拦截过程中发生了爆炸。推文

text: WarMonitor Iran still has greater military strength than U.S. officials have publicly acknowledged. (CBS) https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2047048929603113272/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor：伊朗的军事实力仍强于美国官员公开承认的水平。（CBS）https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2047048929603113272/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Darrell Sheets, known for Storage Wars, has died at 67. Police in Lake Havasu City say he died from a self inflicted gunshot wound to the head. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047048422146859204/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：《仓储战争》（Storage Wars）明星达雷尔·谢茨（Darrell Sheets）去世，享年 67 岁。哈瓦苏湖市警方称，他死于头部自残枪伤。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047048422146859204/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Vivek Ramaswamy on aid to Israel: Says he's always been for phasing out aid and was the only major candidate taking that position in the 2020 primary. Calls the obsession with the question "unhealthy" given how small a share of the budget it represents. Pushes back on the framing that Israel is the source of Americans' problems. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：维韦克·拉马斯瓦米（Vivek Ramaswamy）谈及对以色列的援助：他表示自己一直主张逐步取消援助，并且是 2020 年初选中唯一持此立场的候选人。他称对这个问题的痴迷是“不健康的”，因为它在预算中所占份额很小。他反驳了以色列是美国问题根源的说法。推文

text: Open Source Intel The S&P 500 closed at a fresh all-time high - 7137 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：标普 500 指数收于 7137 点的历史新高。推文

text: Disclose.tv JUST IN - Laura Loomer loses defamation lawsuit against Bill Maher and HBO over joke that she was having an affair with Trump. https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2047046226411950273/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 快讯：劳拉·卢默（Laura Loomer）因关于她与特朗普有染的笑话而起诉比尔·马赫（Bill Maher）和 HBO 的诽谤案败诉。https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2047046226411950273/photo/1 推文

text: OSINTtechnical The WH Press Secretary downplays Iran seizing two ships in Hormuz: “These were not US Ships. These were not Israeli ships… [The US has] completely obliterated Iran's conventional navy, these two ships were taken by Iranian gunboats. They don’t have control of the strait.” https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2047046150331519431/video/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical：白宫新闻秘书淡化了伊朗在霍尔木兹海峡扣押两艘船只的事件：“这些不是美国船只。这些也不是以色列船只……[美国]已经彻底摧毁了伊朗的常规海军，这两艘船是被伊朗炮艇扣押的。他们无法控制海峡。”https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2047046150331519431/video/1 推文

text: ELINT News RT @Faytuks : Lawmakers were told that Iran may have emplaced 20 or more mines in and around the Strait of Hormuz. Some were floated remotely using GPS technology, which has made it difficult for U.S. forces to detect the mines as they are deployed. https://www.washingtonpost.com/national-security/2026/04/22/iran-hormuz-mines/ tweet
text_zh: ELINT News 转推 @Faytuks：立法者被告知，伊朗可能在霍尔木兹海峡及其周边地区部署了 20 枚或更多的水雷。其中一些是利用 GPS 技术远程漂浮部署的，这使得美军在部署时难以探测到这些水雷。https://www.washingtonpost.com/national-security/2026/04/22/iran-hormuz-mines/ 推文

text: ELINT News RT @Faytuks : BREAKING: It could take six months to fully clear the Strait of Hormuz of mines deployed by the Iranian military, the Pentagon has informed Congress -WaPo https://twitter.com/Faytuks/status/2046996880467407292/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: ELINT News 转推 @Faytuks：突发：五角大楼已通知国会，完全清除伊朗军方在霍尔木兹海峡部署的水雷可能需要六个月的时间。-华盛顿邮报 https://twitter.com/Faytuks/status/2046996880467407292/photo/1 推文
